channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose glass panel, 10th March
item.description:
There is a loose glass panel on thy bus shelter, metal parts detached. Glass may be liable to fall off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124-130, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Dog mess needs collecting and washing away as troden in., 10th March
item.description:
This shit has been there for a week and as no cleaners attend it will never be collected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
